description: Solo Compass UI/UX refactor + AI architecture upgrade + Roadmap exploration. Three-phase delivery: (1) Apple-grade UI polish — floating filter capsule, glassmorphism FAB, skeleton screens, radar-chart solo scores, chat state machine, voice waveform, city-picker dedup, InsetGrouped preferences. (2) AI depth — ContextManager protocol, Go RAG pipeline for real-review-based scores, multi-agent orchestration (Intent/Query/Guide). (3) Roadmap — Markdown PKM export, Obsidian dark theme, offline-first cache, Edge AI spike. See tasks/prd-experience-architecture-v1.md.

acceptanceCriteria: Create Views/Shared/SkeletonView.swift with shimmer animation
Support .redacted(reason: .placeholder) integration

Add SwiftUI #Preview demonstrating 3-line text skeleton
Typecheck passes (xcodebuild build -project apps/ios/SoloCompass.xcodeproj -scheme SoloCompass)
Tests pass

Tap on capsule restores it immediately

Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Produce Edge AI feasibility spike report
userStories.description: As a team, we need a written evaluation of running a small LLM/embedding model on-device for offline intent classification.
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/edge-ai-feasibility.md
Section 1: Apple NaturalLanguage framework - capabilities, accuracy benchmark on 20 sample utterances
Section 2: Core ML quantized intent classifier - feasibility, model size estimate
Section 3: MLX framework with nomic-embed-text (~80MB) - performance on iPhone 15 Pro
Section 4: Recommendation + 3-step adoption roadmap
No production code required (spike only)
Typecheck passes
